topics.name: INNER JOIN
topics.description: Returns records that have matching values in both tables

topics.name: LEFT JOIN
topics.description: Returns all records from left table and matched records from right table

topics.name: RIGHT JOIN
topics.description: Returns all records from right table and matched records from left table

topics.name: FULL JOIN
topics.description: Returns all records when there is a match in either table

topics.name: CROSS JOIN
topics.description: Cartesian product of the two tables

topics.name: Self Join
topics.description: Joining a table to itself to compare rows within the same table
